I'm a full-stack AI automation developer based in Delhi. I founded AgentFlow AI to solve a simple problem — Indian businesses are losing crores on manual work AI can replace in days.

With hands-on experience at DARL (Delhi Analytical Research Lab) — working with food manufacturers and FSSAI consultants — I understand exactly where automation creates the most impact. My philosophy: build once, automate forever.

FAQ

Common Questions

How long does setup take?+

Most AI systems are live within 3–7 business days. Day 1: consultation. Day 2–3: build. Day 5–6: testing. Day 7: go live. You see results from day one.

Do I need technical knowledge?+

Zero technical knowledge required. You tell us your requirement on WhatsApp — we build, test, and hand it over with full training. You just use it.

Is my business data safe?+

100% confidential. Your data stays in your own secure cloud infrastructure. For Tender AI, documents never leave your server. We sign NDAs on request.

What industries do you work with?+

Food manufacturers, FSSAI consultants, testing labs, local ISPs, contractors, distributors, coaches, and any SMB with manual repetitive operations. Our founder has direct food industry experience via DARL.

What's the difference between one-time and monthly?+

One-time systems (AI Calling, Tender AI) are yours permanently — pay once, use forever. Monthly systems (Digital Employee) include ongoing maintenance, updates, and monthly task execution.

Can I see a demo before paying?+

Absolutely — 100% free. Book a 15-minute demo on WhatsApp. We'll show you live how the system works for YOUR specific business, on a real example from your industry. No commitment required.
